α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
inst✝¹ : Group α
inst✝ : Group β
F : @CategoryInContext.Functor Unit Unit (Category.Monoid α) (Category.Monoid β)
⊢ ∃ f, ∀ (x : α), @CategoryInContext.Functor.homF Unit Unit (Category.Monoid α) (Category.Monoid β) F () () x = f x

proof:
use {
    toFun := fun x => F.homF (X := ()) (Y := ()) x
    map_one' := F.map_id ()
    map_mul' := fun x y => F.map_comp x y
  }
  intro x
  rfl

    simp only [Category.comp, Category.Monoid] at h
